ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to each unit */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch ID the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the unit has been in operation */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the unit was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance event */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance event */,
  "unit_status" TEXT /* Status of the unit (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was produced */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the batch expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit the event belongs to */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event type */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technician who performed the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_events_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_events_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "interval_days" INTEGER /* Recommended interval in days between events of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the cost belongs to */,
  "cost_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cost type */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the cost */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES maintenance_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_cost_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_type_id") REFERENCES cost_types ("cost_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_types" (
  "cost_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost type */,
  "cost_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintenance manager, technician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission applies to (e.g., units, maintenance events) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert type */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., pending, acknowledged) */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES maintenance_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "alert_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., maintenance history, cost analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, create, update, delete) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
